results.title: More Than Dozen Passengers Banned By Carnival Cruise Line Following Wild Brawl That Resulted In Flying Luggage: REPORT
results.description: A total of 16 passengers have been issued a ban by Carnival Cruise Line following a gargantuan brawl Monday in a customs line in Florida. According to footage from social media, the brawl featured over a dozen male and female individuals punching one another, while also causing luggage and stanchions to fly at a Miami-Dade [...] The post More Than Dozen Passengers Banned By Carnival Cruise Line Following Wild Brawl That Resulted In Flying Luggage: REPORT appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: VHP Calls for Review of Family Laws, Stronger Cow Protection Measures
results.description: GG News Bureau Haridwar, 24th June: The Central Marg Darshak Mandal of the Vishva Hindu Parishad (VHP) has called for a review of family laws, greater transparency in temple management, stronger cow protection measures, and intensified efforts for social harmony and de-addiction, following the conclusion of its two-day meeting in Haridwar. Addressing a joint press [...] The post VHP Calls for Review of Family Laws, Stronger Cow Protection Measures appeared first on Global Governanace News .

results.title: Bengaluru Triple Murder
results.description: While Shwetha has been nabbed in Puducherry, her boyfriend Kenneth is still on the run.

results.title: Ronaldo hogs limelight
results.description: Cristiano Ronaldo had a simple but strong message as the final whistle sounded after Portugal's big win at the World Cup on Tuesday. The post Ronaldo hogs limelight appeared first on News Today | First with the news .

results.title: Meta Tracked Keystrokes, Clicks And Screens: Did Its AI Training Project Cross The Line?
results.description: Meta is facing backlash after over 45,000 tables containing employee activity, their private conversations, performance data and transcriptions were accessible across the company
